trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: implement a real blocked-submit state by requiring attached evidence before a student can submit a proposal for review.
scope: Update `/api/submissions/:id/submit` to enforce a minimum evidence-artifact gate (409 + audit) so the proposal workflow has a concrete blocked-submit state; extend integration coverage and update MVP docs/logs/manifests.
changes: Added evidence-artifact gating to `/api/submissions/:id/submit`: returns 409 `submission_missing_evidence` (audited) when no non-archived evidence artifacts are attached.
Updated the teacher review-loop integration fixture to attach one evidence artifact and assert the review queue reflects `evidence_count=1`.
Added an integration test proving the blocked-submit behavior when evidence is missing.
Updated MVP catalog + automation memory + run logs with this new blocked-submit evidence and added this structured run manifest.
known_limits: This run enforces evidence presence but does not yet persist guided section drafts/versions for the proposal workflow.
next_actions: Add a D1-backed draft/sections persistence table for guided proposal content and preserve prior versions on resubmission.
Wire the submit gate into the student UI with a friendly missing-evidence callout before the submit attempt.
